title: calophyllum walkeri
intro: Calophyllum walkeri, also known as the Calophyllum tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Calophyllaceae. This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Calophyllum walkeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. In traditional medicine, the tree's oil is often extracted and used in herbal preparations, such as creams and ointments, to treat skin conditions and wounds.
